title: Facility List
description: Facility list showing institution hierarchy (Institution → Division → Location). VistA File 4 (INSTITUTION) and File 40.8 (MEDICAL CENTER DIVISION) are the source of truth. Platform PG holds tenant-to-facility mapping. Read-only mirror of VistA data with platform governance overlay.

dataSources.description: VistA institution records from File 4 — read-only mirror.
VistA medical center division records from File 40.8 — read-only mirror.
